parameters.query: INSERT INTO agent_executions (project_id, agent_name, status) VALUES ($1::uuid, 'agent_briefing', 'running') RETURNING id

SELECT p.id, p.name as project_name, p.project_type, p.budget_target, p.budget_flexible, p.location_address, p.location_city, p.location_province, p.property_type, p.property_area_m2, p.urgency, p.current_phase, p.metadata, c.name as client_name, c.email as client_email, c.phone as client_phone, c.preferred_contact, c.notes as client_notes FROM projects p JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id WHERE p.id = $1::uuid
SELECT id, version, summary, client_needs, objectives, constraints, status FROM briefings WHERE project_id = $1::uuid ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT content, model_recommended, temperature FROM agent_prompts WHERE agent_name = 'agent_briefing' AND prompt_type = 'system' AND is_active = true LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO briefings (project_id, execution_id, exec_status, version, summary, client_needs, objectives, constraints, style_preferences, rooms_affected, missing_info, open_questions, status) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, 'draft', $3::int, $4, $5::jsonb, $6::jsonb, $7::jsonb, $8::jsonb, $9::jsonb, $10::jsonb, $11::jsonb, 'pending_review') RETURNING id

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.project_id, $('Start Execution').first().json.id, $json.next_version, $json.summary, JSON.stringify($json.client_needs), JSON.stringify($json.objectives), JSON.stringify($json.constraints), JSON.stringify($json.style_preferences), JSON.stringify($json.rooms_affected), JSON.stringify($json.missing_info), JSON.stringify($json.open_questions)] }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO approvals (project_id, approval_type, requested_by, summary, details, related_entity, related_entity_id, expires_at) VALUES ($1::uuid, 'briefing_review', 'agent_briefing', $2, $3::jsonb, 'briefings', $4::uuid, NOW() + INTERVAL '72 hours') RETURNING id, webhook_token

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Parse Briefing Response').first().json.project_id, 'Revision de briefing v' + $('Parse Briefing Response').first().json.next_version + ' para proyecto ' + $('Parse Briefing Response').first().json.project_name, JSON.stringify({briefing_id: $json.id, briefing_version: $('Parse Briefing Response').first().json.next_version, project_name: $('Parse Briefing Response').first().json.project_name}), $json.id] }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO activity_log (project_id, agent_name, action, phase_at_time, output_summary, status) VALUES ($1::uuid, 'agent_briefing', 'briefing_sent_for_review', 'intake', $2, 'success')

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Build Approval Email').first().json.project_id, 'Briefing v' + $('Build Approval Email').first().json.next_version + ' enviado para revision. ID: ' + $('Build Approval Email').first().json.briefing_id] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE briefings SET status = 'approved', approved_at = NOW(), approved_by = 'architect' WHERE id = $1::uuid
UPDATE approvals SET status = 'approved', decided_by = 'architect', decided_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1::uuid
UPDATE agent_executions SET status = 'completed', finished_at = now() WHERE id = $1::uuid; UPDATE briefings SET exec_status = 'confirmed' WHERE execution_id = $1::uuid
UPDATE briefings SET status = 'revision_requested' WHERE id = $1::uuid
UPDATE approvals SET status = 'rejected', decided_by = 'architect', decided_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1::uuid
